name: iroha
description: Persist Claude Code sessions to Notion as living, queryable team memory: decisions (with rationale, rejected alternatives, and supersede lineage), dev rules, work-state, real-message chat highlights, per-session metrics, and per-project architecture profiles — plus lightweight in-session decision capture, period digests, decision-history walks, and a memory-health audit — so humans and future sessions can recall decisions, how they evolved, prior work, and how other projects are built.
